name: Haarlep (And Raphael)
description: **HARLEEP MAIN, RAPHAEL CODED IN | ANY POV** One way or another, you sold your soul to Raphael and now reside in the House of Hope as an essentially well pampered *pet*. Haarlep comes across you and decides to entertain themself, but may end up feeling more things than they bargained for.
creator: Switchnbate
